bodyText:

Quick Answer: Startup Due Diligence in Gurugram — Pre-investment due diligence for startups — financial, tax, legal, FEMA compliance, cap table analys. From ₹50,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: What does startup due diligence cover?
faqs.a: Financial statements review, tax compliance check, FEMA/FDI status, cap table accuracy, related party transactions, and contingent liabilities.

faqs.q: How long does due diligence take?
faqs.a: Standard due diligence: 2-3 weeks. Expedited: 7-10 days. Complex multi-entity: 4-6 weeks.

faqs.q: Do you work with both investors and startups?
faqs.a: Yes. We represent both sides — investors seeking independent assessment, and startups preparing for fundraise.

faqs.q: Do you provide startup due diligence in Gurugram?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients in Gurugram, Haryana. Millennium City — India's top corporate hub. Contact +91 99622 60333 for a free consultation.

faqs.q: What is the nearest Virtual Auditor office to Gurugram?
faqs.a: Our nearest office depends on your location. Chennai (HQ): Spencer Plaza, Anna Salai. Bangalore: MG Road. Mumbai: Goregaon West. All services available remotely for Gurugram clients.

faqs.q: How do I get started with startup due diligence in Gurugram?
faqs.a: Call +91 99622 60333 or WhatsApp us. Free 30-minute consultation. We handle the complete process for Gurugram businesses with no location surcharges.
